title: The Shandia Join the Battle
description: The Shandia attack Upper Yard, revealing that Skypiea’s conflict is bigger than the Straw Hats and tied to stolen land.
scene: Across pages 6, 8, 9, 10, this scene centers on Gan Fall, Shandia warrior, Wyper, Luffy, Nami. The Shandia attack Upper Yard, revealing that Skypiea’s conflict is bigger than the Straw Hats and tied to stolen land.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Just think about it a little!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: there may be traps like earlier...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I'm thirsty. Let's have some tea!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Yeah. Yeah! Not a bad idea.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Open up the Senbei* in your backpack!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You bastard! Get out of here!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hey! Sanji! In front! A cloud!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Are these floating things all snake eggs!!?

summary: The Shandia attack Upper Yard, revealing that Skypiea’s conflict is bigger than the Straw Hats and tied to stolen land.
